package main

import (
	"context"
	"flag"
	"fmt"
	"os"
	"os/signal"
	"syscall"
	"time"

	"k8s.io/client-go/rest"
	"k8s.io/klog/v2"

	"github.com/anomalyco/agentcube/pkg/store"
	"github.com/anomalyco/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
)

func main() {
	port := flag.Int("port", 8080, "HTTP server port")
	runtimeClassName := flag.String("runtime-class-name", "", "Runtime class name for sandboxes")
	enableTLS := flag.Bool("enable-tls", false, "Enable TLS")
	tlsCert := flag.String("tls-cert", "", "Path to TLS certificate file")
	tlsKey := flag.String("tls-key", "", "Path to TLS key file")
	enableAuth := flag.Bool("enable-auth", false, "Enable authentication")
	klog.InitFlags(nil)
	flag.Parse()

	klog.InfoS("Starting Workload Manager", "port", *port)

	cfg := &workloadmanager.Config{
		Port:             *port,
		RuntimeClassName: *runtimeClassName,
		EnableTLS:        *enableTLS,
		TLSCert:          *tlsCert,
		TLSKey:           *tlsKey,
		EnableAuth:       *enableAuth,
		ReadTimeout:      30 * time.Second,
		WriteTimeout:     30 * time.Second,
	}

	if err := cfg.Validate(); err != nil {
		klog.ErrorS(err, "Invalid configuration")
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	storeCfg := store.NewConfigFromEnv()
	if err := store.InitStore(storeCfg); err != nil {
		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to initialize store")
		os.Exit(1)
	}
	defer store.Close()

	s := store.Storage()

	k8sConfig, err := rest.InClusterConfig()
	if err != nil {
		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to get in-cluster config, falling back to default config")
		k8sConfig = &rest.Config{}
	}

	k8sClient, err := workloadmanager.NewK8sClient(k8sConfig)
	if err != nil {
		klog.ErrorS(err, "Failed to create Kubernetes client")
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	srv := workloadmanager.NewServer(cfg, k8sClient, s)

	ctx, cancel := context.WithCancel(context.Background())
	defer cancel()

	sigCh := make(chan os.Signal, 1)
	signal.Notify(sigCh, syscall.SIGINT, syscall.SIGTERM)

	errCh := make(chan error, 1)
	go func() {
		if err := srv.Run(ctx); err != nil {
			errCh <- err
		}
	}()

	select {
	case err := <-errCh:
		if err != nil {
			klog.ErrorS(err, "Server error")
			os.Exit(1)
		}
	case sig := <-sigCh:
		klog.InfoS("Received signal, shutting down", "signal", sig)
		cancel()
	}

	shutdownCtx, shutdownCancel := context.WithTimeout(context.Background(), 15*time.Second)
	defer shutdownCancel()

	if err := srv.Shutdown(shutdownCtx); err != nil {
		klog.ErrorS(err, "Shutdown error")
		os.Exit(1)
	}

	klog.InfoS("Workload Manager stopped gracefully")
}
